title: ERCOT Real Time System Conditions CSV download
description:
Real Time System Conditions as reported by ERCOT. This data is sampled by ERCOT out of a number of different data feeds. This dataset is useful for understanding the instantaneous condition of the grid.

Metrics include:
* Frequency
* DC Tie Flow
* System Inertia
* Wind and Solar Output
* System Demand
* Time Error
